name: Almond Sensational face scrub and mask
description:
Re-discover your skin’s lost glow with Naturally-U’s Almond Sensational face scrub and mask!

Yearning for something more than just routine cleansing for your skin? Well, look no more! Naturally-U’s Almond Sensation face scrub is the talk of the town when it comes to Spa like exfoliation and deep cleansing. With a base of almond meal and white clay, this product oozes with the nourishment of proteins, minerals, and vitamins: a SUPERFOOD for your skin if you will! A lot of other coveted ingredients come together in this unbelievable scrub to give you anti-ageing benefits such as skin lightening and repair, balancing the face complexion, and reduction of puffy eyes and under-eye dark circles. What are we waiting for now?

name: Ayurveda in a pot face cream
description:
Bring home a little ancient Indian wisdom in Naturally-U’s Ayurveda in a pot face cream.

Ayurveda is the ancient Indian science of using a combination of medicinal herbs and traditional techniques of preparation. Before the invention of modern medicine, Ayurveda was the most prominent and potent method of healthcare and well-being in the East. Even today, many Indian households trust their age-old home remedies for common everyday complaints. Naturally U brings this ancient wisdom to you in a convenient face cream avatar, with goodness of Sandalwood, Turmeric and Kumkumadi essential oil. Experience the blessings of Mother Earth and make this magical experience your own!

name: Goat Milk Rose Soap
description:
Get winter-ready skin with Naturally-U’s Goat Milk Rose Soap

The Goat milk soap is inspired by the European milkmaids of yore known for their chistled complexion. Goat milk exfoliates gently while maintaining your skin’s elasticity and prevents dryness, especially in colder climates. Rich in fatty acids and vitamins, our goat milk is freshly sourced from local farms in Holland. Rose essence adds to the goat milk properties and together they help you keep a youthful appearance and get a supple skin texture. Lose yourself in the creamy goodness of nature’s abundance with fresh and hydrated skin!

name: Tribal Indian Hair Oil
description:
Give your brittle and dull hair the tender loving care of Naturally-U’s Tribal Indian Hair Oil

Our very own years old recipe, based on the ancient Indian science of Ayurveda. Are hair-fall and dandruff giving you sleepless nights? Is it STRESS? Or POOR DIET? Or EXCESSIVE USE OF CHEMICALS or extended use of INFERIOR QUALITY HAIR PRODUCTS? Whatever the cause, pause and let our Tribal Indian hair oil work its magic! Our most in-demand product, we have the highest number of returning customers for this hair oil. Made with 13 rare medicinal herbs from India, this hair oil not only arrests hair-fall but also improves your hair and scalp quality and helps in faster hair growth, when used regularly.

name: Himalayan Foot Soak
description:
Take a well-deserving break… soak yourself into the relaxing magic of our Himalayan Foot/Bath Salts!

Too much on your plate? Take a break and unwind with a relaxing bath. Our Himalayan foot and bath salt is here to help! A combination of Epson salt, Dead Sea salt and Himalayan Pink Salt, this product helps you get rid of body ache in the first dip. Epson relaxes and de-stresses your body while the Himalayan Pink salt perfectly exfoliates the dead skin cells. Subtle fragrance of Eucalyptus and Lemon grass is a cherry on top of this rejuvenating bathing experience that prepares you for a well-rested sleep!

name: Loofah
description: The natural loofah sponges are grown as cucumber-like zucchini plant and then sun-dried. This 100% natural sponge gently removes dead skin cells, leaving the skin radiation. For an ultimate smooth and soft result, use the natural loofah sponge in the shower several times a week.

name: Lotion bar
description:
NaturallyU’s Lotion bars to replenish dry and parched skin?? Hell YEAH!!

Dry skin making winter and cold wind a horrifying time for you?? Our lotion bars are here to save the day! Those with extremely dry skin know the aggravating skin turmoil that comes with chilly winters and gets worse with hot water. NaturallyU’s lotion bars are your answers to all dry skin woes. With three kinds of butters as base ingredients: Mango, Shea, and Cocoa butter, even the most stubborn skin types transform into lovable and caress-worthy soft skin. Let your hands slide over after this transformational bathing experience!

name: Minty Lip balm
description:
Grab your Minty Lip balm from Naturally-U for gorgeously moisturised lips!

Make room in your grooming kit for the tiniest member of the Naturally-U family, our Minty Lip Balm! Your lips will thank you for this mind-blowing moisturisation and nourishment, and you will never go back to anything else. Feel the freshness of peppermint all day and SMILE AWAY…!

name: Strawberry Lip Balm
description:
Have some fun with NaturallyU’s Strawberry Lip Balm and kiss dry lips goodbye!

Fun on your mind?? Pack a kiss-worthy punch with our Strawberry Lip balm. With all the essential moisturising in strawberry flavour, there really is not much to think about now. Your lips will thank you for this mind-blowing moisturisation and nourishment, and you will never go back to anything else. Let your bubbly fun side take over and SMILE AWAY…!

name: Bamboo face towel
description:
This special Bamboo face towels is perfect to give final touch to your skincare routine.

Does your skincare routine involve washing your face? Then you need a towel to dry it off :-)

Our Bamboo Face Cloth is perfect for that!

It has the right size: not too small, not too large (72 x 33 cm)

Extra soft bamboo terry – great even for those with sensitive skin

Why would I need a separate towel for my face?

Because it’s better for your skin! Like it or not, bacteria do build up in towels and that’s why it’s recommended not to use the same towel for your face and for your body (or even worse, hands!). Your skin will be much happier with a separate face towel. And don’t forget to change it every other day or so.

name: Neem and Tulsi Soap
description:
Your skin will thank you for this divine cleansing experience from NaturallyU!

Our beautifully handcrafted Neem Tulsi soaps are your answer to problem skin. Infused with the healing properties of traditional Indian herbs: Neem (scientific name) and Tulsi (Holy Basil), coloured with green clay with goodness of tea tree essential oil. Neem is known for its antiseptic properties, and it is an important ingredient of any Indian skincare routine. Basil has exceptional cleansing and healing characteristics. Together, these two make a power duo to give you a bathing experience like never before! With these pretty babies on your bathroom shelf, you can experience the luxury of a boutique spa at home.

name: Uptan Soap
description:
Do not miss out on this traditional exfoliating experience from NaturallyU…Your skin deserves it!

Ever wondered about the turmeric paste ceremony in Indian weddings? An exfoliating wonder and a proven charm for that angelic pre-wedding glow, Uptan is a friend of every Indian bride. Traditionally, the paste is made of gram flour (for exfoliation), turmeric (for antiseptic and healing properties), sandalwood (for fragrance, treating heat rashes and tanned skin) and rose petals (for hydrated and fresh-looking skin). Sounds heavenly! Doesn’t it? But how to apply this messy paste and exfoliate without an entourage of women helpers?? And what about cleaning the mess it leaves behind in your bathroom?!? NaturallyU brings this traditional Indian exfoliating ritual to you in a convenient soap scrub form. Now you can shine every day and look your best!
